(Coleoptera, Chrysomelidae): genetic and morphological unravelling of biocontrol agents for two invasive aquatic plants. ZooKeys 1228: 11-52. https://doi.org/10.3897/zookeys.1228.138773

description: Figure 11 Lysathia cilliersae sp. nov. holotype. male (code MA_T_01) A dorsal view B ventral C head. The eye colour of this specimen is altered by the treatment for DNA extraction D ventral view of fresh specimen E antenna. Scale bars: 1 mm.
